title: Trump rips Canada as wildfire smoke spreads, says U.S. will add pollution cost to tariffs
summary_full: The smoke coming from active wildfires in Canada has led to unhealthy air quality in swaths of the U.S., which could affect the World Cup final in New Jersey.
summary_public: The smoke coming from active wildfires in Canada has led to unhealthy air quality in swaths of the U.S., which could affect the World Cup final in New Jersey.
